case_title: COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE, A CA CORP. vs. KING, CLEO

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE, A CA CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KING, CLEO $1,635.00 PRINCIPAL, $4,006.96 INTEREST, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,664.96, THIS IS RENEWAL OF OLD CASE #050185.
